strategy: Hit with Storm, he takes +15%, and avoid Myth (30% resist).
Skip shields for defense, casting a positive ward makes his Cave Chameleon Pierce it off you. Use resist gear and heals instead.
Do not DoT him. If you hit him while a DoT is on him, his pet Shifts the remaining ticks back onto you, so use burst damage.
He drains pips via Draw Power each round (his Djinns first, then you when they are gone), so do not sit on a huge pip pool, spend it.
Stack blades and a Feint, then land one direct Storm hit, and watch for the pet's Hydra.
cheatNotes: Each round he Draws Power from a Dunes Djinn, or from a random wizard once the Djinns are gone, do not hoard pips.
Cast a shield or any positive ward and his Cave Chameleon Pierces it off you. Rely on resist and heals, not wards.
Hit him while a DoT is on him and his pet Shifts the remaining ticks onto you, use burst, not DoTs.
